mechanics.excerpt: Gunnery / Ballistic This subskill is used for direct-fire weapons that inflict theil damage using bullet or shell_ including autocannons gauss rifles and machine guns Tube artillery uses the Artillery Skill; not this subskill: GAMBLING The Gambling Skill gives character working knowledge of games of chance and helps him cheat or detect cheating tnem; successful Gambling Action Check enables character to cheat during such game.
